div.span: in npm we need need shell for two diffrent things 1. shell npm uses to run scripts written in package.json: -> npm config get shell <- which be seen by this cmd and second one is 2. shell used to run npm scripts those are inside the node_modules/.bin folder -> npm config get script-shell <- which can be seen by this cmd

switch.text: in npm we need need shell for two diffrent things 1. shell npm uses to run scripts written in package.json: -> npm config get shell <- which be seen by this cmd and second one is 2. shell used to run npm scripts those are inside the node_modules/.bin...
